phases.title: Source Realm Inventory
blockingIssues: Production source realm inventory has not been exported.
nextActions: Run production-keycloak-source-export against the signed source Keycloak endpoint.

phases.title: Target Realm Inventory
blockingIssues: Target realm inventory has not been exported after import or restore.
nextActions: Run production-keycloak-target-export after the target realm is prepared.

phases.title: Realm Inventory Comparison
blockingIssues: Source and target realm inventory comparison has not been reviewed.
nextActions: Run production-keycloak-compare and review any JWT key or client differences.

phases.title: Database Backup Restore Rehearsal
blockingIssues: Keycloak database backup and restore rehearsal has not been completed.
nextActions: Restore a production-style Keycloak database backup into the rehearsal target and record restore checks.

phases.title: Admin And Client Secret Rotation
blockingIssues: Admin credentials and client secrets have not been rotated in the target environment.
nextActions: Rotate target admin credentials and confidential client secrets, then store evidence outside git.

phases.title: JWT Public Key Sync To Nacos
blockingIssues: Target Keycloak public key has not been synced to Nacos and gateway consumers.
nextActions: Run the JWT public key sync against the target realm, then restart and smoke gateway/auth consumers.

phases.title: Post Migration Auth Smoke
blockingIssues: Login/current-user/menu/RBAC/organization smoke has not passed against the target realm.
nextActions: Run login, current-user, menu, RBAC authority and organization smoke against the target realm.

phases.title: Rollback Link
blockingIssues: Keycloak rollback or database restore evidence has not been linked.
nextActions: Link the signed rollback evidence for realm restore, database restore and JWT/Nacos rollback.

openIssues.description: This example is only a template and cannot be used as production READY evidence.
openIssues.nextAction: Create a real evidence file outside git and run the strict-ready validator.
